name: Dicker Data Limited
analysis: DDR's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 2% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$12.3900. Trade idea: entry A$12.3900, stop A$11.1425, target A$16.1327 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
